PVT Mode

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x8
Size:
0x4
Source:
pvt_rf.rdl

Description

Selects measurement mode. Temperature: cfg_mode=3'b000. Voltage: cfg_mode=3'b100.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:3] reserved rw 0x0 -
[2:0] cfg_mode rw 0x0 cfg_mode

Field Descriptions

cfg_mode - cfg_mode

Measurement mode select. 3'b000=temperature, 3'b100=voltage.
